name: Kajabi Course & Membership API
what_it_does: Kajabi API for online course and membership platform management. Enables programmatic access to course enrollment data, member records, product sales, and email list management. Used by online educators and coaches to integrate Kajabi with external tools.
use_cases: Querying Kajabi member enrollment and course completion data for learning analytics agents
Retrieving subscription and sales data from creator business reporting agents
Syncing Kajabi contact lists with CRM systems from marketing automation agents
Generating course performance and member engagement reports from analytics agents
not_for: Enterprise LMS with SCORM compliance needs (Kajabi is creator-focused)
Developers needing deep API access (Kajabi has limited public API)
best_when: An online educator or coach using Kajabi wants AI agents to query member data, course analytics, and sales records — automating creator business workflows.
avoid_when: You need extensive API customization. Kajabi's API is limited — not all features are accessible. PRIVACY: Member data includes personal information and learning records.

auth.notes: Kajabi OAuth 2.0 for partner integrations. API key available for direct access. Partner API access requires Kajabi approval.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Kajabi subscription required: Basic ($149/mo), Growth ($199/mo), Pro ($399/mo)
pricing.paid_tiers: API access included with all Kajabi plans
pricing.notes: Kajabi subscription required. API access is included but limited in scope.

performance.rate_limits: Kajabi API rate limits not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Member learning records and personal data requires careful handling
Kajabi API is limited — not all platform features are accessible via API
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
Partner API access requires approval from Kajabi
Course content and member data is sensitive — restrict agent access
agent_readiness.security_notes: Member learning data and personal information. Course enrollment records. HTTPS enforced. API access limited by Kajabi approval.

security_score_components.security_notes: Member data, course enrollment records, and payment data. HTTPS enforced. Limited API documentation.
